3081980.name: Taking The Cross
3081980.description: Taking the Cross is an immersive historical action-adventure game that places you in the heart of the medieval world. You will embark on a perilous journey through the Holy Land, experiencing the challenges, battles, and pivotal moments of this tumultuous era. Engage in epic sieges, strategic warfare, and large battles as as you strive to reclaim sacred territories and achieve glory for your cause. With historically accurate settings, dynamic combat, and a rich narrative, Taking the Cross offers a thrilling blend of strategy, action, and storytelling, allowing players to rewrite history and shape the fate of the Crusades.
